title: Narrative Ontology — Theory-Chunk YAML Frontmatter
description: Validates the chapter-level frontmatter inserted at the head of skills/dramatica-theory/references/*.md (15 chapters). Each block declares which ontology IDs the chapter covers and which scenarios it serves, so nav.py and extract.py can route prose-loading queries to the cheapest chunk.

type.description: Discriminates this frontmatter from L1/L2 operational frontmatter elsewhere in the repo.

chunk_id.description: Stable chunk identifier. Form: 'dt-<NN>-<slug>' mirroring the chapter filename (e.g. 'dt-09-reference', 'dt-06-storyforming').

summary.description: Token-cheap chapter tl;dr. Read by the navigator before deciding whether to invoke extract.py on the chunk.

covers_ontology_ids.description: Ontology IDs whose meaning is explained here. Wildcard form 'kind.*' is permitted for chapters that cover an entire kind (e.g. the canonical-list chapter covers 'class.*', 'type.*', 'variation.*', 'element.*').

serves_scenarios.description: Persona-scenario IDs for which this chunk is a primary reading target. Used by nav.py by-scenario --include-prose to surface relevant chapters.

size_kb.description: OPTIONAL. Approximate chapter size in KB (mirrors `ls -l` output / 1024). Hints at token cost when extract.py is invoked on the whole chunk.

depends_on_chunks.description: OPTIONAL. Other chunk_ids that should be read first for the chapter to make sense in isolation.
